title: Benstonea rostellata

Within the kingdom, it is further classified under the phylum Magnoliophyta and the division Magnoliophyta. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf structure and reproductive organs. The species is also classified under the order Pandanales, which is a part of the clade flowering plants.
